reviews.title: Disappointing Experience at Novatel Goa Candolim
reviews.text:
I recently stayed with family at Novatel Goa Candolim and unfortunately, my experience was far from satisfactory. The lack of cleanliness and the unprofessional behavior of the staff left much to be desired.

Upon returning to the room in the evening, I was dismayed to find an abundance of flying mosquitoes infesting the bed sheets and the bathroom. This made for an uncomfortable and unhygienic stay, particularly considering that I had paid for a luxury room.

To add to the disappointment, I was allocated a small room in a less-than-desirable location, despite having paid for a premium experience. Despite paying for an extra bed, I was denied the accommodation of this request.

The service was equally disappointing, as I had to repeatedly remind the staff and reception about my luggage before it eventually reached my room. Furthermore, the absence of a welcome drink further contributed to the lack of hospitality.

The breakfast was served chilled.

Overall, my stay at Novatel Goa Candolim fell far short of what I had expected from a luxury hotel, and I would caution others against choosing this establishment for a similar experience.

Sincerely,
Advocate  Rakesh Gupta, Chandigarh

reviews.title: Please don't stay here
reviews.text:
We stayed for 3 nights at Novotel Candolim and had a very poor experience for the overall stay.

1. We opted for half board - Food and service are below average for a 5 star property , we found cockroaches near the buffet area and 
low and dull staff , who were clearly overworking and hence unproductive.

2. After highlighting the poor food and hygiene issues - we were given personal attention by the chef but the floor manager after the feedback chose to ignore us.

3. Rooms - we opted for superior rooms , bed was comfortable but the bathrooms are extremely dangerous (slippery). Shower area is not segregated and two of us slipped in bathroom.
4. Bathroom dampness seeps in the room , which has wooden flooring.
5. Toilet flushes were slow and didnt work many times - had to repeatedly ask for housekeeping staff.
6. Oil used for cooking had a very typical smell suggesting poor quality.
7. Swimming pool - were ok.
8. the Only plus point is Location of the property .

Thank you for sharing your valuable feedback with us. My team and I would like to express our sincere apologies for not having lived up to the signature Novotel Experience during your recent stay with us.

We look forward to having an opportunity to restore your faith with us and would hope that we have the chance to do so in not-too-distant future.

Warm Regards,
Ranju SINGH
General Manager

reviews.title: Family Stay in a King-Sized Bed
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at this hotel with my kids and wanted to share my experience regarding the bed accommodations. 

The hotel provides a king-sized bed, which is spacious enough for us, but it could be a challenge for families with multiple children. We found ourselves sharing the large bed, which was cozy but might not be comfortable for everyone, especially if your kids tend to move around at night.

One downside is that if you need an extra bed, the hotel charges an additional fee. This may not have been clear during booking, and it would have been helpful to know in advance. On top of that, the quality of the extra bedding offered is not great, making it less than ideal for a good night's sleep.

In summary, while the king-sized bed works for a small family, I would recommend checking with the hotel about their extra bed policies, especially if more sleeping space is needed. Consider this if you’re traveling with kids and looking for comfort during your stay.

reviews.title: A blot in the Brand
reviews.text: I had high expectations for Novotel given its reputation, but my stay was disappointing. The check-in was frustrating: the receptionist was unwelcoming and on the phone, and I waited five minutes before having to interrupt her. I was told I’d been upgraded to a luxury room with a balcony, but no one directed me to it, so I ended up wandering the property to find the room. The lobby smelled strongly of smoke, and the upgraded room had cobwebs under the TV unit; the balcony doors wouldn’t stay closed and were held only by a small latch. There was also a persistent pest-control odor in the room, which was particularly unpleasant and concerning with a toddler. I asked to be downgraded to my original room, as the promised 'luxury' upgrade turned out to be more of a trick than an improvement. The original (non-luxury) room I requested was better maintained, but other issues remained: the swimming pool was dirty, and the chlorine level was so high it burned our eyes, forcing us to leave. Despite the discounted rate, I cannot recommend this property for a peaceful stay.

reviews.title: Not Recommended for Family
reviews.text:
We stayed here with our toddler. The location is good—on the main road, and the beach is just a 5-minute ride by two-wheeler. The room was clean and comfortable, and the reception area looks nice.

However, for a hotel that claims to be 5-star, the experience was disappointing. The staff lacked warmth, with poor coordination between reception and restaurant teams. Kids’ amenities are almost nonexistent—no proper play area and only one scooter in the entire hotel. The swimming pool activities are all chargeable, even for kids.

The food was good but the spread was limited. Overall, only the room and location stood out; the rest felt average, especially for families with children.

reviews.title: Far from satisfactory
reviews.text:
The hotel is in a good location and has a lot of facilities. But I am really unhappy with the service. Firstly, the hotel is too loud and the rooms do not have noise cancellation. There was loud noise late into the night coming into our room. Secondly, there were multiple power interruptions during our stay and generator backup was slow to start. Power cuts kept happening several times on my third night resulting in disturbed sleep. Thirdly, housekeeping service is very poor. I ran out of hand soap on the third evening, and even after repeated requests the soap wasn't refilled. The intercom in my room also stopped working l and I had to go down to the front desk for every request. The intercom was neither repaired nor replaced until we checked out. Lastly, the front desk staff doesn't seem to be adequately trained. They neither greeted me with a smile when I checked in nor did they apologize even for once when I informed them about my issues. Very poor guest service.
So what are the positives? The breakfast spread was good and the staff at the restaurant are doing a good job. The swimming pool and the sports area are well maintained and the staff here too are helpful.
I wish Novotel sorts out the issues with their front desk and housekeeping soon.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Stayed for six nights with family (including young kids - 7 years old)

By no means could I get the feel of a 5-star property, and that also, when you are opening your pocket to pay per-night charges, that is huge! You do deserve a good experience - that we couldn't!

Room --
Imagine staying in a room that is infested with small cockroaches! And when your young kid runs out of the washroom screaming, seeing those creepy creatures. Or you see them walking on the tea bag wrappers and a tray where cups are put! Or you see them on the floor, on the furniture with a small fridge inside, under the bed! (I am now reading other reviews also who have put the same complaints, and hotel management responding with a 'copy-paste' reply that we will work on that! ). If that could have been the case, we would not have witnessed them in the room! And that is also in a '5-star' property! Wow!

Swimming Pool -- 
The pool floor is rough in the small kids' area and the area where they have slides. No finishing! My kid hurt her knee! And again - the same type of review I read from someone else also. The base/floor of the pool is not visible, but that is the area which needs attention by hotel management. 

Staff --
The reception staff was so much busy they kept forgetting things.
I wanted to have a room decorated with balloons and a cake for a family member's birthday. I had to remind 2-3 times for this. And the least you expect is - they still forgot to send the cake! And the next day when I complained that the cake never came, I got the reply that 'someone' on staff forgot to send it even though it was in the hotel only! Anyways, I got confirmation from the reception staff that the cost of the cake will be deducted from my bill. And when I went to check out, it was not deducted. If I missed checking, I was charged already! This is the negligence of duty, even after you commit to your customer.

We were looking for some advice on a cruise in Panaji & for Doodhsagar and contacted recept

reviews.title: Terrible Staff at Reception
reviews.text:
Had a harrowing time during check in. I reached the hotel at 1:00pm and the check in time was 3pm. I had requested for an early check in. Post reaching the staff asked me to wait as the room was getting cleaned. I kept approaching the reception every 30mins to check if the room was ready, only to be told that the cleaning was in progress. At sharp 3pm (Check in time), when i approached the reception, all the lady did was enter my name on the key card and hand it over, which means that the room was already ready before 3pm, but the lady was not at all bothered. Few points to highlight.
- The lady was not at all courteous
- Customer Service which is the pillar of the hospitality industry was completely absent.
- The lady did not care about the customer (Me) as i was with kids who were running all over the place.
- Out of humanity she could have atleast informed me that it will take time for the room to be ready and i can have my lunch as it was late in the afternoon. And i ended up having lunch only at 4:30pm with the kids driven to the core out of hunger (Very insensitive of her).
- I asked for a matchbox and she said she will ask someone to get it for me. The matchbox never came and i had to go out and ask it from a taxi driver. Again "I don't care" attitude from her.

Finally Velu who is the rooms manager approached me when i had asked to speak to someone higher up post check in and as a goodwill gesture offered a 50% discount on the cab fare from the hotel to the airport.

This was a horrible and a nightmarish experience i have gone through with this hotel. No courteousness, non existant customer service, no smile when receiving and talking to customers, complete ignorance.

reviews.title: A good Stay
reviews.text:
Stayed here for 3 nights with family, listing Pro`s and Con`s : 

PRO`s : 

1 : Location : Right in the middle of the lively North Goa, as soon as you step out of the hotel you are welcomed by the busy street with food joints, local market, bars, pubs, and beach is a 5 minute walk.
2: Staff : Right from the Valet parking to Reception to Housekeeping Staff everyone welcomes you with a smile and so polite and generous. Special shoutout to Front Desk Manager : Rakshith a manager who knows how to keep the guests happy and coming back.

CON`S : 

1: Superior rooms are located in the front building and are quite old and need renovation a big time, especially the washrooms. I had to change the bedroom as the Washroom water was leaking and coming right into the bedroom. 
2: Breakfast : Could have been better, spread was OK but could have been much better.

3: There was a wedding during my stay in the hotel and as a result the breakfast buffet was always over crowded with no social distancing maintained. In case of any such large gathering events the breakfast could be arranged in 2 different halls to avoid crowd and maintain social distancing during this pandemic times.......

Overall it was a nice stay though first night was tough as the bathroom had leakage issues but was sorted by Manager Rakshith next day with an upgrade.

So overall a brilliant stay and would like to come back to Novotel.

reviews.text: Stayed 6 days over Xmas. Quite busy but staff always keen to help and very friendly. Location is good for beaches - a 15 minute walk into Candolim itself. reviews.title: Good hotel, Issues with Check in procedure.
reviews.text:
A good hotel though almost all sites review shows that there is always one or other delay hassle in Check in procedure and my case was no different. I already reached late than check in time but the hotel asked us to pay taxes as they were not sure the billing procedure by Agoda. We were asked to sign a gaurantee to pay taxes before we could check in incase matter could not be resolved by agoda and novotel. Agoda promised us to reimburse us and we signed the gaurantee to pay at checkout. it took us almost 1.5 hrs to get through this. Despite this the certain hotel personnel kept calling on phone next two days to pay the amount as if we are going to run away without paying and Bar services near pool refused to serve us without paying cash. I felt the whole thing cheap for a 4 star hotel to act like this.When brought to attention the head at checkin counter apologised.
 Apart from this the Hotel is nice. they have a larger pool now adjacent to smaller sand pool as shown in pics, Breakfast is awesome and location is good as well. There is a car rent place right across the hotel on candolim road.
I would like to highlight here the Agoda customer support on phone was awesome throughout and showed better professionalism than hotel itself.

When we reached at the expected time we got only one room and they took an additional hour to provide us the room. No one even bothered to answer my additional requirements I made during my booking.

The reception needs to improve.

reviews.title: It was a fantastic holiday for us at Novotel shrem... we booked 2 rooms n were upgraded to pool view
reviews.text:
Pros: Property n service was superb... they have 2 swimming pools n kids had a blast... just that the main pool had only one entry and that too from the far end, which was little weird n inconvenient. 
A very nice indoor kids club kept my kids busy! Loads of games in the hotel lobby! The breakfast menu was very expansive n delicious.
Cons:  food was expensive and couple of things like bathing slippers, gown were provided on demand which normally is not kept in the room till the guest asks for it.
They had a free shuttle to take us to the candolim beach... that’s nice but waiting for shuttles can take upto 1/2 hour also. Also they need to keep few umbrellas if guests wants to step out... it was raining the day we reached but they had no provision for umbrellas.

reviews.title: kids friendly hotel
reviews.text: The place is great if you have kids, they have a good playroom as well for the kids. If you have infants, they help you prepare baby food as well and are super helpful in this department. The only point that I feel they can consider is  having nannies available for a couple of hours on a no charge basis. If the work goes beyond a few hours it could be chargeable. The rates are steep and if one wants to choose the hotel again over other kids friendly places, offering complimentary nanny services would definitely be a plus point .

reviews.title: Nice hotel in a good location
reviews.text: Nice cozy hotel in an excellent location. Though the hotel was very busy the staff was helpful and accommodating. The room is spacious and cozy , very clean and well maintained . The Room Attendant who took care of my room ( his name was Om Singh if I am not mistaken ) always ensured that the room is being serviced in a excellent manner .  For sure I will recommend this hotel to my friends and colleagues traveling to goa.

reviews.title: Amazing staff
reviews.text:
Staff always helpful , got everything sorted out, we had 2 rooms , I was there 4 days before staff noticed my birthday surprised me with a lovely cake. Can't say enough about the staff, they all deserve a raise. 
 Last year I had better value itself, we had towels for beach, this year not. Had trouble finding both bookings, staff took it on and made it not my problem, but I saw they worked on in. Also I could not use my Accor number, devaluating my stock in their brand. 
That does not take away from the amazing staff everywhere in hotel, from cleaning rooms, drive to beach, food service, pool service. Hate to end on a sour note but the breakfast was amazing but served Nescafé! Lousy burnt coffee. I finally figured out a double espresso with water was better. 
The construction was off putting as well but I suppose it's all for improvement. 
Anyway again I'll end with the amazing helpful staff! Best part of hotel!

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.text:
Had a wonderful stay at Novotel Candolim. The entire team is extremely warm, helpful, and attentive, which really made the experience special.

What impressed me the most was how professionally the hotel handled the ongoing LPG shortage in Goa. Even with such a challenge, everything was managed so smoothly that guests would hardly realize what was happening behind the scenes. Managing food and services for so many guests during this time must not be easy, but the hotel’s planning and backup arrangements were truly impressive.

Special credit to the restaurant staff for their dedication and seamless service. Their efforts and positive attitude really stood out.

Kudos to the entire Novotel team for maintaining such high standards of hospitality. Hoping to be back again soon.

reviews.title: A Truly Exceptional Family Getaway at Novotel Goa, Candolim
reviews.text:
Our visit to Novotel Goa, Candolim was an absolute pleasure from start to finish. We enjoyed a truly wonderful stay, finding the hotel to be the perfect base for a relaxing family vacation.

The accommodations were a highlight: the rooms were remarkably spacious and spotlessly clean, offering a truly stunning view that added a layer of tranquility to our mornings.   We also greatly appreciated the good spread of breakfast, which offered a fantastic start to our day. The overall ambiance of the resort is peaceful and relaxing, setting the ideal tone for a comfortable retreat. Moreover, the location is unbeatable, providing effortless access to the beach and key local attractions.

We wholeheartedly recommend Novotel Goa, Candolim for anyone seeking a delightful, smooth, and comfortable vacation. The single minor detail we noted was the bathroom door mechanism, which would be greatly improved if updated to a modern sliding design for added convenience.

reviews.title: Amazing stay at best location
reviews.text: Rooms were neat & clean and equipped with all modern facilities like hair dryer, ironing board, internally fitted air conditioners, with sufficient space available, view from rooms was not so good. Hotel has everything that you need like gym, swimming pool, kids room, bar, mall. Breakfast spread is amazing but if you order food, that's very costly. Hotel is located on the main Candolim road, you can get scooty right outside the hotel, parking is also within hotel premise, lot of food options right outside the hotel.

reviews.title: Good property
reviews.text: We stayed there for 3 days. The staff was good. Location was absolutely spot on. It was right in the centre of Candolim. You can get everything nearby. Maybe a few small things in the room could have been better but overall, good value for money.
